title: Important Advisory: Submit TDS/TCS Correction Statements by March 31, 2026
content:
# Important Advisory: Submit TDS/TCS Correction Statements by March 31, 2026

Ek important update hai taxpayers aur deductors ke liye. Income Tax Department ne ek advisory announce kiya hai regarding the submission of TDS/TCS correction statements.

Yeh advisory highlights karta hai ki:
*   **Correction Statements:** Submit karni hain TDS/TCS correction statements.
*   **Applicable Financial Years:** Specifically for Financial Year 2018-19 (Q4) to Financial Year 2023-24 (Q3).
*   **New Due Date:** The deadline for these submissions is March 31, 2026.
*   **Time-Barred Filings:** From April 1, 2026, these filings will become time-barred.
*   **Reason:** This urgency stems from the advisory stating it is due to the impending repeal of the Income Tax Act, 1961.

Taxpayers ko advised kiya ja raha hai ki woh is deadline se pehle apne required correction statements submit kar dein to avoid any compliance issues.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Visit the Income Tax Department's Official Website here](https://www.incometax.gov.in)

*Published on: 16 March 2026*
